title: Diasperus velutinus
taxonomy: Diasperus velutinus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to South Africa and is also known as the velvet-stemmed Diasperus. The exact classification of Diasperus velutinus may vary depending on the source, but it is commonly classified as a succulent plant. Further classification would involve breaking it down to its genus and species level, with the genus being Diasperus and the species being velutinus. The classification of Diasperus velutinus is still a matter of ongoing research in the field of botany.
